name: netexec
title: netexec
description:
Network Execution Tool
NetExec (AKA nxc) is a network service exploitation tool that helps automate
assessing the security of large networks.
.
NetExec is the continuation of CrackMapExec, which was maintained
by mpgn over the years, but discontinued upon mpgn's retirement.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use netexec because Network Execution Tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use netexec as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `netexec [options] [args]` as documented upstream for netexec.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair netexec with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `netexec --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
